name: Mad Skills Rallycross
author: Poki
description: Mad Skills Rallycross is a high-speed racing game where you hit the track, battle rivals, and push your driving skills to the limit! Win races to earn rewards, upgrade your gear for better performance, and unlock a variety of cars to customize and power up. Every race is faster, tougher, and more exciting than the last. Ready to burn rubber and dominate the rallycross scene? How to play Mad Skills Rallycross? Boost: W or the up arrow key or the space bar Turn left or right: A/D or the left and right arrow keys Who created Mad Skills Rallycross? Mad Skills Rallycross is created by Turborilla. Play their other games on Poki: Mad Skills Motocross 2 ! How can I play Mad Skills Rallycross for free? You can play Mad Skills Rallycross for free on Poki. Can I play Mad Skills Rallycross on mobile devices and desktop? Mad Skills Rallycross can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
